summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. This shard has no shared canonical; merge, fix, raise_pr, and low-signal closeout are blocked by job permissions, so hydrated non-security PRs are classified independently and non-mutating. Two validator-identified security-sensitive refs are quarantined with route_security. Four candidate refs were not present in the compacted hydrated item matrix, so those specific refs need a fresh preflight before classification.
